name: web-search-plus-plugin-v2
description: OpenClaw plugin: multi-provider web search (Serper/Google, Brave, Tavily, Linkup, Querit/Multilingual AI Search, Exa/Neural+Deep, Firecrawl, Perplexity, You.com, SearXNG) with intelligent auto-routing. Requires at least one configured provider API key or SearXNG instance URL.

env.SERPER_API_KEY: optional Serper/Google search provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.BRAVE_API_KEY: optional Brave Search provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.BRAVE_COUNTRY: optional Brave Search country code override
env.BRAVE_SAFESEARCH: optional Brave Search safesearch default: strict, moderate, or off
env.TAVILY_API_KEY: optional Tavily research search/extraction provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.LINKUP_API_KEY: optional Linkup source-grounded search/extraction provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.QUERIT_API_KEY: optional Querit multilingual search provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.EXA_API_KEY: optional Exa neural search/extraction provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.FIRECRAWL_API_KEY: optional Firecrawl search/extraction provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.PERPLEXITY_API_KEY: optional Perplexity direct API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.KILOCODE_API_KEY: optional Kilo gateway key for Perplexity-compatible search; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.YOU_API_KEY: optional You.com search/extraction provider API key; only used when configured/enabled for this plugin
env.SEARXNG_INSTANCE_URL: optional self-hosted SearXNG instance URL; search queries are sent to this URL when configured/enabled
env.SEARXNG_ALLOW_PRIVATE: optional danger flag; true disables SSRF/private-network protection for SearXNG and should only be used on fully trusted private networks

author: robbyczgw-cla
